title: Security Headers & Cookie Hardening
description: Design 'Default-Secure' configurations for HTTP security headers like Strict-Transport-Security and X-Content-Type-Options. Implement cookie hardening techniques using `__Host-` prefixes and other attributes. Harden the client-side security boundary against common web vulnerabilities using security headers.
objectives: Design 'Default-Secure' configurations for HTTP security headers like Strict-Transport-Security and X-Content-Type-Options.
Implement cookie hardening techniques using `__Host-` prefixes and other attributes.
Harden the client-side security boundary against common web vulnerabilities using security headers.
